title: Phlomoides multifurcata
taxonomy: Phlomoides multifurcata is a plant species classified in the family Lamiaceae. It belongs to the genus Phlomoides, which is a group of flowering plants. The species Phlomoides multifurcata is native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. Its classification also includes the order Lamiales, which is a group of flowering plants that have bilateral symmetry. The plant's classification is part of its broader taxonomic structure.

Research on its medicinal uses is limited, but it has been traditionally used in local medicine to treat various ailments.
